policy.larger_gate_boundary: A larger equal battle gate may run only after blocker adds are naturally exercised or the package is revised.
policy.natural_replay_boundary: This report collects natural replay evidence only; it does not run the larger battle gate.
policy.promotion_boundary: No deck mutation or promotion is opened by this report.
